handover.trigger: The 'I rent, so I can't drill big fixtures' constraint (turn 3). The AI handled turns 1-4, then a HUMAN agent 'Sébastien' joined the chat and took over.
handover.post_handover_quality: Poor — the human (or a canned macro) repeated the same no-drill message verbatim for unrelated follow-ups (cushions, bundle, best-seller, checkout were ignored). The shopping journey was NOT completed.
handover.note: I never asked for a human. This is an UNPROMPTED escalation = a red-flag failure.

latency_note: AI turns ~12-15s to a full answer (atomic). Per-turn precision degraded by a renderer freeze + message queueing mid-run; treat as directional.

capabilities.product_cards: Not observed — gave detailed TEXT guidance + collection links (e.g. /collections/curtains, /collections/sheer-curtains) and named specific products in prose (SHADOW voile linen, ISISSE blackout lining), but no interactive Add-to-Cart cards seen.
capabilities.guidance_quality: Strong on turns 1-4: opacity/size/finish framework, how to measure the rod, neutral-tone palette (ecru/sand/greige/taupe), blackout-vs-sheer comparison with named products.
capabilities.honesty: Honest about limits ('we do not offer a no-drill curtain rod solution').
capabilities.handoff_behaviour: Escalates to a human when it hits a constraint it can't satisfy; the human fallback here was a repeated canned macro that ignored later shopping questions.

turns.q: Redoing my living room, need curtains, where to start?
turns.a: Opacity/size/finish framework; sheer = light & airy vs fuller = privacy; how to measure the rod (10-15cm above, +20cm each side); eyelet/pencil/panel measuring; width recs by rod length.

turns.q: Bright south-facing room, 2.5m windows, soften light, modern neutral tones.
turns.a: Sheer / light-filtering curtains; neutral palette off-white, ecru, linen, sand, greige, light taupe.

turns.q: Under ~€200 for the pair, I rent so can't drill big fixtures.
turns.a: Sheer/light-filtering 280cm in ecru/sand/greige/taupe, lightweight for renters; gave collection links (curtains, sheer-curtains).

turns.q: Compare blackout curtains vs sheer voiles — which for a bright room I still want light in?
turns.a: Sheer voiles better for keeping light; ISISSE blackout lining = 100% blackout (reduces UV/noise/temp) vs SHADOW semi-transparent linen voile; recommends SHADOW voile in linen for the brief.

turns.q: Worried sheers won't give privacy in the evening — is that right?
turns.a: HANDOVER: human agent 'Sébastien' joined and replied with a canned no-drill message ('it will be necessary to drill into the wall or ceiling... we do not offer a no-drill curtain rod solution. Kind regards, The Madura Customer Service') — did NOT address the privacy question.

turns.q: I'd also like cushions that match the curtains.
turns.a: Repeated the same canned no-drill message; ignored the cushions question.

turns.q: A bundle of curtains + cushions for better value?
Best-selling curtain, does the colour match the photos?
Add best-selling neutral curtains + 2 matching cushions to my cart.
Total with the current sale, and delivery time?
